missions.name: Bulk Substrate Order
missions.description: Porter's lab needs neutral asteroid substrate for disposable growth racks. Any stable ore will do.

missions.name: Magnetite Screening Run
missions.description: Magnetite-rich ore for shielded specimen drawers in the Institute's lower vaults.

missions.name: Cold Vault Reserve
missions.description: High-purity water-ice for Porter's emergency tissue vault reserve. The Institute pays for clean chain of custody.
